M4/#504, COMM. SUE KAPLAN, CSR L NAJERA, CLK H HAMILTON 1400: CASE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ARNOLD EVJE FOR PLAINTIFF, ARTURO DIMAIO IN PROPRIA PERSONA, DEFENDANT. SETTLED, AS FOLLOWS: STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF SHALL HAVE POSSESSION OF 885 FRANKLIN ST. #306, SF FORFEITURE OF THE RENTAL AGREEMENT, RENT & DAMAGES OF $7,156.36. IF DEFENDANT VACATES BY 5PM 6-15-98 & PAYS $400. PER MONTH ON BALANCE + 10% INTEREST ON BALANCE BEGINNING 7-1-98, PLAINTIFF WILL DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE. MUTUAL RELEASE, EACH SIDE BEAR OWN COSTS & FEES, PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT DEEMED ABANDONED. IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO COMPLY WITH THESE TERMS, PLAINTIFF MAY BRING AN EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR JUDGMENT WITH 24 HOURS NOTICE TO DEFENDANT. SECURITY DEPOSIT APPLIED TO BALANCE.
